case_title: ACCESS GROUP INC. VS. DARREN C LAMBERTI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-12-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO SECTION CCP 1033; WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEE; CALCULATION OF INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 16175003) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCESS GROUP INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 16049034) AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBERTI, DARREN C
DECLARATION REGARDING COPY IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL PURSUANT TO CCP 1550 & 1551 (TRANSACTION ID # 16175003) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCESS GROUP INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-12-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ACCESS GROUP INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCESS GROUP INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBERTI, DARREN C DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-21-2015
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $438.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 16175003) AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBERTI, DARREN C

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACCESS GROUP INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMBERTI, DARREN C $22,469.56 PRINCIPAL, $11,714.95 INTEREST, $438.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $34,622.51, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED (TRANSACTION ID # 15123168), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCESS GROUP INC. SERVED APR-13-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBERTI, DARREN C
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16175003) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY CCP SECTION 585 (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 16175003) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCESS GROUP INC.
